steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase "help those companies thrive" shows the exchange can support the growth of small firms.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
The blank needs a verb meaning "to foster / help grow" — the exchange CONNECTS small companies to investors, which supports their growth. Substitute each choice:
  • "designate": assign or label; the exchange isn't labeling companies, it's helping them grow. ✗
  • "nurture": encourage growth and development; connecting small companies to investors helps them flourish. ✓
  • "preclude": prevent; the exchange is helping these companies, not blocking them. ✗
  • "assess": evaluate; the exchange isn't reviewing them, it's actively supporting them. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
